# Dúnedain Pipe

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

*Item. Pipe.*

---

Attach to a **_Dúnedain**_ character. Limit 1 per character. 
**Action**: Exhaust Dúnedain Pipe and place a card from your hand on the bottom of your deck to draw a card.
